title: All In One (PvP)
description: All In One is a highly customizable modpack made to help you get better with the help of many tweaks.
body:
**All In One** is a **highly customizable modpack** made to help you get better with the help of many tweaks. 

This modpack is based off the [**PurifiedFPS modpack**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/purified-fps), making the game playable even to those with a Low-tier PC.

This project takes Minecraft PvP to the next level with the help of many **QoL mods**.
The mods vary from the most helpful to tweaks making the game run smooth and clean so that you dont have sudden FPS drops while you play.

[My Patreon :)](https://www.patreon.com/ImPatysoo)
